raw_consumer_statement: American Express XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  CA XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX NY XXXX XXXX XXXX ) XXXX RE : Acct XXXX Complaint I called the business on XX/XX/year> to let them know I need them to refund my credit balance of {$12.00} sitting on this paid off account. I spoke to a man named XXXX who refused to mail my refund to my home address of record in the form of a check. I told them that I was going to file a Formal Complaint if they are refusing to refund money that I don't owe.
